title: Build a replay and counterfactual harness for evaluating proposed guardrails before live trust
objective: Create a replay harness that can estimate what session results would have been under alternative guardrails before those guardrails are trusted live.

context.problem: New guardrails need replay-first evidence. We need a way to estimate losers blocked, winners blocked, pnl delta, and repeat-loss cluster impact before trusting new controls live.
context.classification: observability gap plus strategy evaluation tooling

required_work: 1. Build a narrow replay harness that can evaluate proposed guardrails against historical session data.
2. Report, at minimum: losers blocked, winners blocked, estimated pnl delta, and effect on repeat-loss clusters.
3. Keep the harness operationally simple and manager-readable, not a large framework.
4. If trade forensic snapshots exist, consume them; otherwise document the minimum assumptions used.
acceptance_criteria: Harness can evaluate at least one alternative guardrail configuration on historical data
Output reports losers blocked, winners blocked, estimated pnl delta, and repeat-loss-cluster effect
No live bot behavior changed by this task
python -m py_compile core/risk.py passes if modified
verification: Run py_compile on every changed file
rollback: Revert only the files listed in allowed_files if they were changed for this task.
